room.caption: [WarshipI]
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(99)
global.partySplit=1
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20SideA) cloudBack=instance_create(0,0,oWarshipCloudBack) windEffect=instance_create(0,0,oWarshipWindPGen)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1015) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
